reference: Hi, I have a small, pea-sized lump under the skin on the pad of my left thumb. It does not hurt, but it is very hard. I think it may be a calcium deposit because I had one of those about a year ago, and I cut it out of my arm. How do I get rid of it or find out what it is?
text: Hi, I have a small pea-sized lump under the skin on the pad of my left thumb. It does not hurt, but it is very hard. I think it may be a calcium deposit because I had one of those about a year ago and I cut it out of my arm. How do I get rid of it or find out what it is?
